title: create provider with user account
description: Test the POST /api/owner/providers/create-user endpoint to verify that a new provider with a user account can be created successfully. Validate required fields, unique email constraint, organization membership, and department ownership. Confirm the response includes provider details and a temporary password.

title: create provider record for existing user
description: Test the POST /api/owner/providers endpoint to create a provider record for an existing user. Verify that the owner is a member of the organization, and the provider record is created with correct department association. Confirm the organization enable logic is triggered if applicable.

title: delete provider record
description: Test the DELETE /api/owner/providers/:id endpoint to delete a provider record. Verify that the provider exists, the owner is a member of the provider's organization, and the provider is removed along with organization membership cleanup. Confirm organization disable logic is checked after deletion.

title: create department within organization
description: Test the POST /api/owner/departments endpoint to create a new department within the owner's organization. Validate required fields, organization membership, and organization existence. Confirm the department is created successfully and organization enable logic is triggered if applicable.

title: delete department from organization
description: Test the DELETE /api/owner/departments/:id endpoint to delete a department. Verify that the department exists, the owner is a member of the department's organization, and the department is deleted successfully. Confirm organization disable logic is checked after deletion.
